description: The forced migration of the Vine creative community to Instagram and YouTube after Twitter announced the shutdown of the Vine app in October 2016. This tracks the survival rate of creators after platform death.

key_events.description: Twitter announces that it will shut down the Vine app, leaving the community stranded.
Prominent Vine creators post final 'Goodbye' videos, signaling their transition to YouTube/Instagram.
Long-term data shows that only a fraction of Vine creators achieved the same scale on other platforms.

calibration_notes: Useful for understanding the fragility of creator economies when a host platform is decommissioned.
